violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Sani bucket found with less than 200ppm Quat solution.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -In walk in cooler-No date mark on Maple hot cake commercial deli sandwiches and date rubbed off of BBQ pork. *Corrected on-site. -In small refrigerator-hot dogs were not date marked. -Market Fresh sandwiches in deli to go display were not date marked.
Contaminated food disposition. — --Not all hot hold food items were time stamped in holding case.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Shelf used below 3 comp sink have raw edges/exposed particle board. -Particle board shelves in use at one rack in walk in cooler.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Small black refrigerator has broken door gasket.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Microwave has dried food debris at bottom interior edge of microwave.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Some debris at back edge of soda machine ice chutes. -Debris at bottom interior tray of table top toaster oven.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. -Plastic forks for customers were not stored inverted to protect food contact surface. COS-inverted into a different container. -Open sleeve of pizza flats are not stored inverted in dry storage area.--Single-service item was reused or used more than one time. -Small coffee cup used repeatedly to fill water well in hot hold unit.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Employee rinsed sauce scoop at hand sink.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Cement floors at dish pit area/walk-in cooler are unsealed and have minimal paint remaining.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Debris build up at floor/wall edges in back room (near soda bibs). -Debris/residue build up below 3 comp sink and below mop sink.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
